/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o "BZideChannelStrip_artefacts/Release/VST3/B-Zide Channel Strip.vst3/Contents/MacOS/B-Zide Channel Strip" CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o CMakeFiles/BZideChannelStrip_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o  "BZideChannelStrip_artefacts/Release/libB-Zide Channel Strip_SharedCode.a" libBZideAssets.a -framework CoreAudioKit -framework DiscRecording -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework Accelerate -framework WebKit -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework QuartzCore -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security
